title: Analysis registry row — one TSV row in analysis_registry.tsv
description: Flat catalogue row, one per registered analysis_id. analysis_registry.tsv has these columns in order (tab-separated, header on the first line). Use TSV for grep / pandas; use the per-analysis JSON (analysis_v1.schema.json) under analyses/<analysis_id>.json for the full structured form (nested inputs.sets / inputs.artifacts arrays). Per SETS_AND_ANALYSES.md §'The TSV catalogues'.

description.description: One line; multi-line descriptions live in the JSON.

input_entity_types.description: Comma-separated entity_type names this analysis consumes as sets (e.g. 'sample,variant_site'). Order doesn't matter.

input_layer_types.description: Comma-separated layer_type names this analysis consumes as artifacts (e.g. 'beagle_file,sites_file').

definition_path.description: Path to the per-analysis JSON (analysis_v1) when more detail is needed.
